creator: 0mp@FreeBSD.org
text:
My host system is panicking when resuming if there are any VirtualBox virtual machines running.

I wasn't able to create a core dump so I only have a photo of the panic:
https://people.freebsd.org/~0mp/bugs/virtualbox-panic.jpg

I'm running:
- FreeBSD 13.0-CURRENT r348877 GENERIC-NODEBUG  amd64
- virtualbox-ose-5.2.30
